name: Mondongo Elegante - Elegant Tripe
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------SAUCE---------------------------
2 tablespoons Olive Oil
8 oz Tomato Sauce
1/4 lb Chopped Uncooked Ham
1 cup White Table Wine
2 tablespoons Capers (or to taste)
3 oz Pimento Stuffed Olives
Place tripe, pigs' feet, water, onion, bay leaf, parsley, garlic, peppercorns, and salt in a kettle. Cover and simmer until tender. Cool. Remove meat from broth, strain, and reserve 2 cups of broth. Remove bones from pigs' feet. Coarsely chop pigs' feet and tripe. Set aside.
Wilt onion in oil, add tomato sauce, cook for 5 minutes. Add broth, ham, tripe, pigs' feet, and wine. Adjust seasoning, simmer a few minutes longer, then add capers and olives.
Note: The original recipe text has been rewritten to maintain the same title, ingredients, and instructions while ensuring clarity and consistency. No additional ingredients or steps were added or removed.
